potential_hallucinations.claim: $340K+ in revenue impact across 17 program launches
potential_hallucinations.location: Paragraph 1: 'including $340K+ in revenue impact across 17 program launches'
potential_hallucinations.detail: CRITICAL HALLUCINATION. '$340K+' does NOT appear in content_library.md. content_library.md cites '$316K' (team's highest revenue — InGenius) and '$115K in revenue' (PM variant). The '$340K+' figure only appears in outreach_patterns.md and email_style_signature.md — it appears to be an invented aggregate not traceable to a single verified accomplishment. Additionally, '17 program launches' does NOT appear in content_library.md (only '15+' or '20+' programs). This claim combines two unverified numbers into a single impressive-sounding statistic that cannot be defended in an interview.
potential_hallucinations.recommendation: REMOVE or REPLACE. Options: (A) Replace with '$316K in team revenue across 15+ program launches' — both numbers verified. (B) Drop the revenue claim entirely and cite the 78% enrollment rate and 600+ participants instead. Do NOT send this cover letter as-is.
